name: Peanut Butter Temptations
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Remove wrappers from candies.
3. Line small muffin cups (1-3/4 inches in diameter) with paper baking cups.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, peanut butter, egg, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
5. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the butter mixture, beating until well blended.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place one in each prepared muffin cup. Do not flatten.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until puffed and lightly browned. Remove from oven.
8. Immediately press a peanut butter cup onto each cookie.
9. Cool completely in the muffin pan. Yield: about 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
